canonical_aggregation.description: Best checkpoint per fold, evaluate each of 75 test cases once, per-case mIoU

learning_curve_aggregation.description: Single seed (1337), 5-fold CV, fold-level mIoU average
learning_curve_aggregation.note: Higher than canonical: single seed + per-fold averaging (not per-case)

fifteen_run_aggregation.description: 3 seeds × 5 folds = 15 runs, fold-level mIoU averaged
fifteen_run_aggregation.note: Most conservative: fold-level averaging includes seed variance

recommended_for_paper.primary_table: Use 15-run fold-level (0.690±0.045) in main Table 1 for consistency with all architectures
recommended_for_paper.per_case_analysis: Use per-case (0.732, n=75) for clinical metrics table and per-type stratification
recommended_for_paper.learning_curve: Report as 'single-seed 5-fold CV' with note that canonical 3-seed mIoU is 0.732
recommended_for_paper.dice_score: Report Dice=0.812±0.162 (per-case, 3-seed canonical) and Dice=0.839±0.032 (learning curve, single-seed fold-level)

seed_count_note: Learning curve analysis used seed 1337 only (4 fractions × 5 folds = 20 training runs). Main results use 3 seeds (1337, 2020, 2021) × 5 folds = 15 runs per protocol.
